{{Quote|Gravity's silhouette remains, but the star and all the planets, disappeared they have. How can this be?|Yoda|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
'''Casna Aure''' was the ninth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kamino system/Legends|Kamino system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] orbited by 28 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].
